evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: We now have a spiffy [dbt-osmosis documentation site](https://z3z1ma.github.io/dbt-osmosis/)! 🎉

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: The docs site is the canonical reference for the current CLI, configuration model, migration notes, and newer command families such as `generate`, `nl`, and `test-llm`.

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: We have a [migration guide](https://z3z1ma.github.io/dbt-osmosis/docs/migrating) to help you out. 🚀

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: Hello and welcome to the project! [dbt-osmosis](https://github.com/z3z1ma/dbt-osmosis) 🌊 serves to enhance the developer experience significantly. We do this through providing 4 core features:

evidence.title: Bump ydata-profile dependency and add support for Python 3.13
evidence.excerpt: Bump ydata-profile dependency and add support for Python 3.13 (state:closed)

evidence.title: v1.3.0
evidence.excerpt: ## Changes See the [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/z3z1ma/dbt-osmosis/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for a full list of changes. Automatically detected changes: * fix: apply ruff-format to all files failing pre-commit lint (#337) @copilot-swe-agent * Fix trailing whitespace in writer.py failing pre-commit hooks (#336) @copilot-swe-agent * Fix CI regressions: YAML writer, catalog matching, sync behavior, thread-pool, and tests (#335) @z3z1ma * [fixes 331] update path in tutorial links (#332) @macraesdirtysocks * add metrics to preserved keys (#330) @EvavW * feat: add logic to skip empty array columns when no columns or --skip-add-source-columns (#327) @LuigiCerone * fix: normalize column-level meta to config.meta for dbt 1.9+ (#324) @dtaniwaki * fix(tests): correct mock paths and context type in test_generators (#319) @ota2000 * feat: add Python 3.13 support and upgrade ydata-profiling (#318) @ota2000 * Fix --check behavior when --dry-run is used (#316) @ththicn * fix: handle missing ColumnInfo.config attribute in dbt-core 1.10+ (#313) @nazihkalo * Fix Azure OpenAI support broken with openai>=1.0.0 (#310) @cwmuller * feat: add external YAML formatter integration (--formatter) (#323) @Ricar…
